productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Black T-shirt
description: Composition Black t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with full raglan sleeves, shirt collar, front buttoned placket, one pocket on the right chest with a buttoned closure and a small pocket on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron on decorations Get casual and comfortable in style with this black t-shirt from united colors of benetton. The shirt collar and white stitch detailing gives this tee a stylish look, while the cotton fabric keeps you comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for that cool, casual look. Model statistics The product is a size EL on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
